name: Tushar Jain
tagline: Versatile Software Developer specializing in scalable backend services, microservices, and full-stack solutions, proficient in robust API design, data management, and deployment automation.
about: A highly skilled Software Developer adept at designing, implementing, and optimizing scalable systems, REST APIs, and database schemas. Expertise includes architecting robust backend services with NestJS and Python-based microservices, alongside full-stack development using React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Proven track record in establishing CI/CD pipelines, enhancing security protocols, and contributing to complex projects, including AI/ML-based recommender systems. Committed to collaborative teamwork, continuous learning, and delivering high-quality, maintainable code.
highlights: Architected and developed scalable backend services using NestJS, implementing modular architecture and well-defined REST APIs.
Built Python-based microservices for PDF processing and asynchronous workflows, enabling decoupled and scalable system design.
Designed and implemented REST APIs and database schemas using Node.js and MongoDB for various platforms including healthcare and ERP systems.
Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and backend testing workflows, improving deployment reliability and system stability.
Strengthened security protocols and rules of a chat messaging system, resulting in zero data breaches.
Collaborated with a team of four to develop an AI/ML-based Flipkart recommender system, achieving Semi-Finalist status in Flipkart Grid 5.0.
Selected for Amazon ML Summer School 2024.

projects.name: Contest-Saathi
projects.description: A web application delivering personalized email notifications for coding contest reminders. Successfully built a dedicated user base of over 50 active subscribers, ensuring timely updates and enhanced engagement through automated notification delivery.

projects.name: Insight Terminal
projects.description: A Cobra-based CLI tool designed to streamline user interaction with Gemini AI, significantly enhancing command-line efficiency. Integrates Gemini AI's advanced natural language processing capabilities to deliver accurate, real-time responses and information retrieval directly within the terminal interface.
